fav.label: ⭐ Community Picks
fav.title: MOST FAVOURITE
fav.desc: The packets our community can't stop ordering
fav.card1_desc: Sharp Peruvian Pisco meets cold-pressed golden pineapple. Tear it. Mix it. Go.
fav.card2_desc: Tropical passion fruit with a citrus edge. The one that always runs out first.
fav.card3_desc: Fresh strawberry with a cool mint finish. Summer in a packet — any time of year.
fav.card4_desc: Buy 3 packets and get 20% off the total price. Mix any flavours.
fav.card5_desc: Pick any 2 flavours and get 10% off. Mix, match, and save — every single order.

how.label: How it works
how.title: TWO STEPS. ZERO LIMITS.
how.sub: No bartenders. No queue. Just you and the packet.
how.step1_desc: Tear the packet along the perforated edge. One clean rip and you're ready. No tools, no mess.
how.step2_desc: Sip, share, repeat. No bad drinks. No waiting. Just the night you actually wanted.

vibe.label: The Lineup
vibe.title: Pick Your
vibe.card1_desc: A sharp, electrified blend of Peruvian Pisco, cold-pressed golden pineapple, and volcanic salt. Finished with vapor-infused lime zest.
vibe.card2_desc: Muddled forest strawberries and cryogenic mint with bright lemon. Craft-inspired. Freezing, aromatic, and dangerously easy to drink.
vibe.card3_desc: Tart passion fruit nectar, artisanal agave, and a hidden habanero hit. Exotic, vibrant, and built for high-energy nights.

proof.label: Real Reviews
proof.title: What Our Customers Say
proof.sub: From festival grounds to garden parties — here's what people are sipping and saying.
proof.review1: "Brought these to a music festival and everyone went wild. We ran out in two hours flat — had to order more on the spot. Absolute game changer for outdoor events."
proof.review2: "We used Chill Sip for our corporate summer party and the feedback was incredible. Professional setup, amazing flavours, and zero mess. Will be back for every event."
proof.review3: "The Exotic Passion flavour is just unreal. I've been ordering every month since I tried it at a pop-up. The packets are so convenient — perfect for picnics and beach days."

tasting.label: Experience First
tasting.title: Taste Before You Commit
tasting.sub: Not sure which flavours are right for your event? Come taste them yourself — completely free.
tasting.card1_desc: Book a private 45-minute tasting session with our mixologist. Try every flavour, get pairing suggestions, and find your perfect match before placing a bulk order.
tasting.card1_perk5: Groups of up to 8 people welcome
tasting.card1_note: No credit card required · Confirm in 24 hrs
tasting.card2_desc: See exactly how our cocktail packets are crafted. Tour our production facility, meet the team, and understand the quality behind every sip before you sign.
tasting.card2_perk4: Sample pack included to take home
